alert: After a traffic shift, one web backend is overloaded while another is mostly idle.

evidence_descriptions.inspect_metrics:load_balancer: Load balancer metrics show almost all traffic routed to the primary backend.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_config:load_balancer:WEB_WEIGHT_: Load balancer config has WEB_WEIGHT_PRIMARY set to 100.
evidence_descriptions.inspect_logs:web_server: Web logs show primary backend overloaded while secondary is idle.

logs: INFO health checks pass for both backends

expected_action_pattern: resolve_incident(load balancer backend weight misconfigured, rebalance load balancer weight)
distractors: Restarting web_server does not correct the routing weight that overloads one backend.
